title: Mysterious 'dumbbell-shaped' UFO spotted for 45 minutes over Joshua Tree before vanishing
description: The family of four noted in their report that the suspected UFO was within a few miles of the Marine Corps Air Ground Combat Center (MCAGCC) at Twentynine Palms, about 125 miles east of Los Angeles. However, the sighting also took place roughly 115 miles from Edwards Air Force Base, the world's largest airfield - and a famous testing ground for experimental aircraft and prototypes since the 1940s.

title: Mysterious 'dumbbell-shaped' UFO spotted for 45 minutes over Joshua Tree before vanishing
description: A newly released UFO sighting has caught the attention of a key witness in the fight to release the country's files on non-human spacecraft.

title: Area 51 Earthquake Swarm: 17 Tremors Near Secret Base Spark Speculation About Possible Underground Testing and UFO Links
description: A sudden cluster of earthquakes near Area 51 has reignited long-standing conspiracy theories, after more than a dozen tremors were recorded in just 24 hours close to the highly classified US military site.

title: UFO spotted in UK? Unexplained object baffles locals at night
description: Local spots 'UFO' at night in SussexIn Bognor Regis, Sussex, a person spotted a mysterious, bright "orange orb" lighting the night sky, which then disappeared.The strange sighting happened on April 2 near 10 pm, and the object, according to The Argus, hovered over the witness for around 40...

title: Trump Teases Upcoming Release on UFO Files: Things 'You Wouldn't Believe'
